ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the artist */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the artist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the album */,
  "artwork_url" TEXT /* URL to the album artwork */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the album is a single */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the album is a compilation */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks on the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label that released the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number on the album */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track in minutes and seconds */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "is_bonus_track" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track is a bonus track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played */,
  "track_url" TEXT /* URL to the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content manager, artist, general user) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_history" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date and time the track was played */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to play the track (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the track was played (e.g., city, country) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the play event was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the play event information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the track */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the collaboration is associated with */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborating artist */,
  "is_feature" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the artist is featured on the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)
